mapper.select:
SELECT crm.CNSG_REQS_ID , crm.REQS_INTT_ID , crm.CNSG_PTRN_CD , ccd_ptrn.COM_CD_NM AS CNSG_PTRN_NM , crm.CNSG_REQS_TTL , crm.CNSG_STTS_CD , ccd_stts.COM_CD_NM AS CNSG_STTS_NM
, crm.RGSN_USER_ID , crm.RGSN_TS , crm.AMNN_USER_ID , crm.AMNN_TS
, crm.RGSN_USER_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_CNSG_REQS_M crm LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd_ptrn ON crm.CNSG_PTRN_CD = ccd_ptrn.COM_CD_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd_stts ON crm.CNSG_STTS_CD = ccd_stts.COM_CD_ID WHERE crm.REQS_INTT_ID = #{reqsInttId} ORDER BY crm.RGSN_TS DESC
